documents.title: Refund Policy
documents.text: Customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase. Refunds for annual plans are prorated from the cancellation date. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

documents.title: Support SLA
documents.text: Priority 'high' tickets receive a first response within 1 business hour. 'normal' within 1 business day. 'low' within 3 business days. SLA timers pause while a ticket is awaiting customer reply.

documents.title: Known Issue: SSO Login Loop
documents.text: A redirect loop on SSO login is usually caused by a stale session cookie. Workaround: clear cookies for the auth domain, then re-authenticate. Permanent fix shipped in release 4.2.

documents.title: Known Issue: Duplicate Invoice
documents.text: Duplicate invoices can occur if a payment webhook is retried. The billing reconciler dedupes within 24 hours; manual duplicates should be voided, not refunded.
